summary: The test suite is exceptionally comprehensive and adheres strictly to the TDD and CI/CD requirements. It uses bats-core for detailed logic validation, including specific date arithmetic and output formatting (Markdown/JSON). The integration testing through the `run-act-tests.sh` harness is robust, verifying not only the success of the GitHub Actions workflow but also the exactness of its output values. Static analysis (shellcheck, actionlint) is integrated into the test suite, ensuring high code quality. The use of multiple fixtures for different scenarios (mixed, all-ok, all-expired) demonstrates high rigor.
